LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT AVIS BUDGET CAR RENTAL, LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT ACTED REASONABLY BY RELYING ON MS. ALBANO'S DRIVER'S LICENSE AND PLAINTIFF FAILS TO DEMONSTRATE THAT DEFENDANT ACTED NEGLIGENTLY OR ENGAGED IN CRIMINAL WRONGDOING WITHIN THE MEANING OF THE GRAVES AMENDMENT (49 USC 30106). DEFENDANT CORRECTLY NOTES THAT THIS ACTION INVOLVES LIABILITY, NOT INSURANCE COVERAGE OR FINANCIAL RESPONSIBILITY LAWS. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: LAURA MARTINEZ, CSR #11332

calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Dec-16-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: ALEXANDRA BACHAN, ESQ., 510.286.8900, FOR PLAINTIFF JOSE CARPIO ET AL.
CHRISTIAN MOLLOY, ESQ., 760.772.4273, FOR DEFENDANT AVIS BUDGET CAR RENTAL, LLC.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANT AVIS BUDGET CAR RENTAL, LLC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is granted. Defendant acted reasonably by relying on Ms. Albano's driver's license and plaintiff fails to demonstrate that defendant acted negligently or engaged in criminal wrongdoing within the meaning of the Graves Amendment (49 USC 30106). Defendant correctly notes that this action involves liability, not insurance coverage or financial responsibility laws. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Court Reporter: Laura Martinez, CSR #11332

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-20-2013 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-07-2013 Set For Order To Show Cause On Apr-09-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-19-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - ATTY. GIANINA DIMITROU OF THE LAW OFFICE OF JAMES S. BACHAN, TEL. NO. (510) 286-8900 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. CHRISTIAN D. MALLOY OF THE LAW OFFICES OF MICHAEL KRUPPE, TEL. NO. (760) 772-4273 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT AVIS BUDGET CAR RENTAL, LLC'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Overruled in its entirety. Whether Defendant Albano had permissive use of the rental car at the time of the accident and whether the Graves Amendment applies to this case both involve factual issues improperly resolved on demurrer. It is not evident from the face of the complaint that there was a previous case or arbitration and Defendant fails to support its argument regarding the previous litigation and pending arbitration award with matters that could be judicially noticed. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077 =302/EG
